title: Practice Menu Tacit Media Preview
goal: Expose inline image/video preview for existing non-media tacit browse items on /practice/menu/:menuId using the already-fetched PracticeMenuBundle.tacit_media, without changing practice store/runtime/query/admin boundaries or expanding into signed/private URL handling.
constraints: Keep src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/types/practice.ts, src/lib/practice/sessionView.ts, router, sim pages, and admin flows unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Keep src/lib/practice/menuView.ts bundle-only and do not import session-state helpers or PracticeSessionPage-local rendering helpers

Limit this task to inline media preview attached to existing non-media tacit browse items; defer signed/private URL handling, modal/gallery/custom player work, pure media-type tacit item browse cards, PracticePage card preview, runtime/store derived promotion, debug console work, and admin authoring
Preserve the existing expandable browse interaction, body text preview, sensory tags, and safe start-session CTA on PracticeMenuPage
Render image/video in a minimal native way only when URLs are directly usable; do not introduce extra Supabase reads/writes
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
Reuse existing gameVariables.css tokens first and keep PracticePlaceholder.module.css changes additive under browse-prefixed classes
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure menu browse helper can derive stable per-tacit media preview data grouped by tacit_item_id and sorted by sort_order (with deterministic tie-breaker when needed) from the existing PracticeMenuBundle
The helper keeps current non-media tacit browse ordering intact, attaches media only to the corresponding browse item, and does not import React, Zustand, Supabase, or sessionView helpers

PracticeMenuPage keeps the existing menu details, step-group expand/collapse UI, body preview, sensory tag preview, and start-session CTA, and renders inline image/video preview only when a browse item has media
If a browse item has no media, the UI remains text-first and does not leave broken spacing or placeholder chrome
Queries, types, practiceStore, runtime, sessionView, PracticePage, sim routes/pages, and PracticeAdminPage remain behaviorally unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/menuView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
